title: STAT+: Can you spot a deepfake X-ray? Neither can your radiologist
summary: Deepfake images can mislead viewers, upend elections, and instigate violence. They can also, researchers say, disrupt medical care.
summary_ko: 딥페이크 이미지는 의료 서비스를 방해할 수 있다고 연구자들이 말합니다. 이는 의료 분야에서 인공지능 기술의 잠재적인 위험성을 나타냅니다.

title: RA Capital targets China with latest SPAC deal
summary: The prominent investor aims to merge its latest special purpose acquisition company with a Chinese biotech, according to a securities filing.
summary_ko: RA Capital이 중국의 바이오테크 회사와 합병을 목표로 하는 새로운 SPAC 거래를 발표했습니다. 이는 중국의 바이오테크 산업이 성장하고 있음을 나타냅니다.

title: Earendil Labs, an AI-powered drugmaker, hauls in $787M
summary: The hefty funding will support a U.S.- and China-based startup that’s amassed a pipeline of nearly 20 drugs and formed two lucrative partnerships with Sanofi.
summary_ko: AI 기반 의약품 개발사 Earendil Labs가 7억 8,700만 달러의 자금을 확보했다. 이 자금은 미국과 중국에 기반을 둔 스타트업의 약물 개발을 지원할 예정이다.

title: Gilead's $2.2B Ouro buyout delivers autoimmune T-cell engager, new purpose for Galapagos
summary: Gilead is paying $1.68 billion for a T-cell engager company via a front-loaded deal that could also give new meaning to its aimless partner Galapagos.
summary_ko: Gilead는 Ouro를 22억 달러에 인수하여 자가 면역 질환 치료를 위한 새로운 약물 표적을 개발할 수 있게 되었습니다.

title: Biotech investors set to meet with key congressional panel
summary: A group of biotech investors will meet with members of a congressional commission that's been charged with keeping the US competitive in biotech and protecting national security, amid the rise of China's own life sciences ...
summary_ko: 바이오텍 투자자들은 미국의 바이오텍 경쟁력과 국가 안보를 유지하기 위한 의회 위원회와 회의를 가질 예정이다. 이는 중국의 바이오텍 산업이 부상하는 가운데 이루어지는 것이다.

title: Gilead bets $1.68B upfront on Ouro Medicines’ autoimmune program, with Galapagos expected to pitch in
summary: Gilead Sciences is set to enter the T cell engager space in an unusual — perhaps even unprecedented — deal arrangement that involves the pharma budgeting about $1.68 billion upfront to buy Ouro Medicines and for Galapagos ...
summary_ko: Gilead Sciences는 Ouro Medicines의 자가 면역 질환 프로그램에 16.8억 달러를 앞으로 지불하여 투자할 예정입니다.

title: Gilead Sciences Gains an Opportunity for Immune System Reset With $1.7B Ouro Acquisition
summary:
Gilead Sciences is acquiring Ouro Medicines, a startup developing T cell engagers for a range of autoimmune diseases. Separately, Gilead is negotiating a deal with Galapagos to share in the development and potential commercialization of the Ouro drug. 
The post Gilead Sciences Gains an Opportunity for Immune System Reset With $1.7B Ouro Acquisition appeared first on MedCity News.
summary_ko: Gilead Sciences는 Ouro Medicines를 17억 달러에 인수하여 면역 체계 리셋을 위한 기회를 얻었습니다.

title: STAT+: Gilead to acquire immunology biotech, offers lifeline to Galapagos
summary: In today's Readout newsletter: Gilead to acquire an immunology biotech and Merck partners with Flagship company on IBD targets. Plus: Do you have what it takes to be CBER director?
summary_ko: Gilead가 면역학 바이오테크 회사인 Ouro Medicines를 인수하여 17억 달러를 투자했습니다. 이는 자가면역 질환 치료를 위한 새로운 약물 개발을 위한 투자입니다.

title: Gilead, with Ouro deal, wagers $1.7B on bispecifics for autoimmune diseases
summary: Acquiring Ouro Medicines, which launched last year, hands Gilead an antibody designed to bind to BCMA and CD3, a pair of immune cell proteins that are popular targets for drugmakers.
summary_ko: Gilead가 Ouro Medicines를 인수하여 자가면역 질환 치료를 위한 새로운 약물 개발을 위한 투자입니다. 이는 바이오테크 산업에서 자가면역 질환 치료를 위한 새로운 약물 개발이 증가하고 있음을 나타냅니다.

title: GE HealthCare claims photon-counting CT clearance from FDA
summary: The new Photonova Spectra aims to capture up to 50 times more data than some of its premium CT predecessors.
summary_ko: GE HealthCare는 새로운 Photonova Spectra를 출시했다. 이 제품은 일부 고급 CT 기기의 50배 이상의 데이터를 캡처할 수 있다.

title: Shionogi pays Apnimed $100M for joint venture to awaken sleep disorder dream
summary: Shionogi has struck a deal to take full control of its sleep disorder joint venture, agreeing to pay Apnimed $100 million upfront for its partner’s half of the business.
summary_ko: Shionogi는 Apnimed와의 합작 투자로 수면 장애 치료제 개발을 위해 1억 달러를 투자했습니다.

title: Triangle Health raises $4M as people turn to AI to understand their health
summary:
Triangle Health raised $4 million to help people understand their health conditions and explore treatment options, Endpoints News learned exclusively.

 After a person uploads or syncs their health records, Triangle’s AI can brainstorm and compare ...
summary_ko: Triangle Health는 400만 달러를 투자받았다. 이 스타트업은 인공지능을 이용하여 건강 상태를 이해하고 치료 옵션을 탐색하는 데 도움을 주는 플랫폼을 제공한다.

title: How A Small Rural Hospital Is Using AI to Catch Heart Disease Sooner
summary:
At Wayne General Hospital in rural Mississippi, clinicians are using Eko Health’s AI-powered digital stethoscope to detect heart conditions earlier in patients with limited access to specialists. 
The post How A Small Rural Hospital Is Using AI to Catch Heart Disease Sooner appeared first on MedCity News.
summary_ko: 미시시피의 한 농촌 병원에서 AI를 사용하여 심장 질환을 조기에 발견하고 있습니다.

title: AI Won’t Replace Clinical Trial Teams, But It Fixes the Bottlenecks That Keep Patients Out
summary:
We don’t have a shortage of willing patients — instead we have a shortage of scalable ways to identify and engage them responsibly. AI, used meaningfully offers a reliable path forward. 
The post AI Won’t Replace Clinical Trial Teams, But It Fixes the Bottlenecks That Keep Patients Out appeared first on MedCity News.
summary_ko: AI는 임상 시험 팀을 대체하지 않지만, 병자를 제외하는 병목 현상을 해결할 수 있습니다.

title: Why Novartis Is Paying $2B for a Cancer Drug That Hits the Same Target as One of Its Own Products
summary:
Novartis already markets the PI3Kα inhibitor Piqray for breast cancer, but acquiring a Synnovation Therapeutics subsidiary brings an early clinical program that the pharma company claims could be best in the class of next-generation therapies for the target. Competitors include Eli Lilly, Relay Therapeutics, and OnKure Therapeutics. 
The post Why Novartis Is Paying $2B for a Cancer Drug That Hits the Same Target as One of Its Own Products appeared first on MedCity News.
summary_ko: 노바티스社는 20억 달러를 투자하여 새로운 암 치료 약물을 개발하고 있습니다.
